scope: Connector-first screen-time management platform with native iOS enforcement on a portable Rust core (54 crates). In-scope: DSL rules engine with triggers/conditions/actions/priority/cooldowns, connector runtime (OAuth2/polling/webhook, verification tiers, registry), reward wallet and penalty ledger with rigidity tiers, SHA-256 hash-chained audit, SwiftUI iOS shell with FamilyControls (gated), CLI, MCP server (type-only), and 10 multi-agent tooling crates. Out-of-scope: Android runtime, full backend services (sync-api/auth-broker are placeholders), GCal/GitHub production OAuth (scaffolded), external security audit.
surface: Rust cargo workspace (54 crates under crates/ + 10 tooling/ binaries), UniFFI FFI to Swift/SwiftUI iOS app, focus-cli binary, focus-mcp-server (MCP type-defined, transport pending), Go services/ stubs, optional PostgreSQL alongside SQLite. CI: clippy/fmt/Vale/commit-msg/deny/SBOM. Spec status: implemented per adea91bc62 (2026-05-06).
cross_repo_roles: Rust core crates reused/shared across mobile, CLI, and MCP
UniFFI FFI boundary to iOS SwiftUI consumer (apps/ios)
focus-cli exposed for automation in repos/orchestration
focus-mcp-server intended as tool surface for AI agents in other repos
Tooling crates (agent-orchestrator, bench-guard, target-pruner, disk-check, quality-gate) shared across Phenotype multi-repo workflows
SBOM (CycloneDX) and fr-coverage feeding cross-repo governance
Canvas/GCal/GitHub/Fitbit/Strava/Readwise/Notion/Linear connectors ingest signals from external platforms
compliance_present: Wallet invariants (balance>=0, spent<=earned, multiplier>=0, NaN rejected)
Connector verification tiers (Official > Verified > MCPBridged > Private)
compliance_missing: Workspace does not fully compile: 5 E-series errors (focus-backup E0505, focus-rituals E0277, connector-gcal/connector-github/connector-canvas type errors)
FamilyControls enforcement gated behind #if FOCALPOINT_HAS_FAMILYCONTROLS pending Apple entitlement
GCal and GitHub OAuth flows scaffolded but non-functional
No onboarding screens shipped (users cannot self-serve setup)
FR-CONN-004 (Canvas OAuth2 cursor sync) contains unimplemented!()
MCP server transport layer not started (type-only)
tooling/fr-coverage and tooling/doc-link-check binaries not built by default
Production LLM endpoint for coaching provider not configured (Stub/Noop only)
Android native runtime absent (JNI stubs only)
Backend services (auth-broker, sync-api) are placeholders only
top_gaps: Fix 5 E-series compilation errors — blocks all testing and downstream CI
Obtain and merge FamilyControls entitlement (Apple SLA 1-4 weeks) — core enforcement feature gated
Complete GCal and GitHub OAuth flows — only Canvas is functional
Ship onboarding UX (currently zero screens) — blocks self-serve adoption
Implement MCP server transport layer (RFC-0001) — exposes core to AI agents across repos
Resolve FR-CONN-004 unimplemented!() and build tooling/fr-coverage + doc-link-check by default
Coachy Rive animation asset (designer pending) and real-device QA pass
External security audit before any production release
